title: 5RoD's ModPack
description: Custom modpack made for FPS and realism, simple vanilla+ feel
body:
# 5RoD: Visuals and Performance

Hitting 12,000 subscribers was a big moment for the channel, so I figured it was a good time to show the exact setup I use in my videos. This is the same pack I actually play with, not something made just to look good for clips.

The idea behind this pack is simple. You’ve probably seen those super realistic Minecraft videos that look cool but don’t really feel like Minecraft anymore. I didn’t want that. I wanted the game to still feel vanilla, just with better lighting, smoother movement, and more atmosphere without changing what makes Minecraft feel like Minecraft.

The tricky part was performance. When you push visuals this much, the game usually starts lagging. To avoid that, this pack uses a lot of optimization mods to keep things running smoothly. It’s not only about looks, it’s about making sure the game still plays well.

The result is a setup that looks really good, feels smooth, and doesn’t kill your FPS. It plays the same as normal Minecraft, just with way more immersion.

As for hardware, I’ll be honest. This is still a high quality pack, even with all the optimizations. It’s meant for people with decent PCs. If your system can handle more than the basics and you want better visuals without turning the game into a lag fest, this pack should work great.

Thanks to everyone in the 5RoD community for the support. Enjoy it.
